description:
You are a chemist setting up a digital chemical inventory in SciNote (http://localhost:3000). Sign in as admin@scinote.net (password: inHisHouseAtRlyehDeadCthulhuWaitsDreaming) and create a new inventory named 'Chemical Compounds Library'. The inventory must include five custom columns: 'CAS Number' (Text), 'Molecular Weight' (Number), 'Expiration Date' (Date), 'Purity Percent' (Number), and 'Hazard Classification' (Text). Populate the inventory with the following records, leaving the Expiration Date column empty:

- Sodium Chloride: CAS 7647-14-5, Molecular Weight 58.44, Purity 99.5, Hazard: Not classified
- Acetic Acid: CAS 64-19-7, Molecular Weight 60.05, Purity 99.7, Hazard: Flammable, Corrosive
- Ethanol: CAS 64-17-5, Molecular Weight 46.07, Purity 95.0, Hazard: Flammable
